hero.name: John Dexter V. Francisco
hero.intro: Hi, I'm Dexter a Fresh Graduate CompSci Student. Nice to meet you <3

about: Recent Bachelor of Science in Computer Science graduate with a growing understanding of software development, web technologies, and database management. Eager to build practical solutions and continue learning emerging technologies, including AI-assisted development tools. Experienced in developing web-based systems using HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript, Node.js, Express.js, PHP, and MySQL through academic projects and professional internship experience. A Dean’s Lister and motivated problem solver seeking opportunities to apply technical skills while continuing to grow as a software developer.
